channel.title: docs
channel.description: Documentation for using the Markata static site generator

item.title: Getting Started With Markata
item.description: Guide to get going with Markata
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: Admonitions
item.description: This is what the default admonition styles look like and how to create them.
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: Changelog
item.description: pydantic support Now plugins are configured through a pydantic Config object. There are a number of breaking changes going into 0.8.0. Use caution when old new
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: Theming Your Markata Site
item.description: Guide to get going with Markata
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: Creating Your Home Page
item.description: There are several ways to create your home/landing page, lets walk through them.
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: Creating Your Navbar
item.description: Guide to creating a navbar in markata using the default template.
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: Waylonwalker.Com

item.author: Waylon Walker
